events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: a cold joint between lifts is flagged as a **fail** (installed-defective / non-compliant, high risk), since it indicates the time limit between lifts per ACI 301 was exceeded without proper joint prep — creating a bond discontinuity and a moisture/chloride ingress path to reinforcement. Recommended actions include stopping work above the joint, bond testing/coring, NCR documentation, and repair (rout-and-seal or epoxy injection) per ACI 301/304 before acceptance.
